title: Show HN: Homegames. An open-source game platform I've been making for 8 years
summary: 一个开源游戏平台，支持在浏览器中编辑和发布简单游戏，所有代码开源。
translated_summary: An open-source game platform that allows you to play, edit, and publish simple JavaScript games directly in the browser, with all source code available on GitHub.
